description_long: This kiosk is a small, standalone commercial structure situated at the center of a larger open area, surrounded by low walls that define its perimeter. The kiosk itself is box-shaped with a flat roof and features a prominent, colorful sign or display on its front face, likely used for branding or information. The surrounding area appears to be a plaza or indoor hall, with the kiosk serving as a focal point for visitors. The structure is primarily constructed from solid, light-colored materials, possibly concrete or plaster, with some metallic or glass elements for windows or signage. The kiosk is accessible from at least one side, with a clear entryway visible in the front view. The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on utility.
description: A modern, box-shaped kiosk with a flat roof and prominent front signage, centrally located within a larger open area defined by low walls. The structure is light-colored and functional, serving as a focal point for visitors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the kiosk centered within a large open area, with the main signage or display clearly visible.
description_view_1: Angled side view revealing more of the surrounding walls and the kiosk's integration into the open space.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the back of the kiosk and the enclosure formed by the surrounding walls.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the kiosk's placement and the open entryway leading toward it.
attribute_signage_type: printed sign or digital display, centrally placed on the front face of the kiosk, featuring colorful graphics or text
attribute_window_presence: one or more windows, likely on the front and possibly sides, rectangular in shape
attribute_door_configuration: single door, front-facing, standard hinged type
attribute_roof_design: flat roof, solid material, no visible overhangs or decorative elements
attribute_architectural_style: modern, minimalist with functional design and clean lines
